## Featured Project

### Milk Tea Shop Management System

A desktop app for managing products, invoices, employees, inventory, and reports.

<sub>C# &nbsp;·&nbsp; WinForms &nbsp;·&nbsp; SQL Server &nbsp;·&nbsp; RDLC ReportViewer</sub>
